A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
By filtering massage therapy businesses using only the description column (call_Dgb4IxkGF794V7b6JtQdRP0V) rather than also leveraging the name field, the agent excluded valid businesses like Elite Massage and Aurora Massage, so after merging with reviews (call_Say3aLZM089RQDzpjulvB0qR) it returned an incomplete set.

FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
